final:
// // This module implements a 4-to-1 multiplexer with a 2-bit select signal, but it actually selects the input based on the least significant bit of the select signal.
module mux4to1 (
    input wire [3:0] in, // 4 inputs
    input wire [1:0] sel, // 2-bit select signal
    output wire out // output
);
    assign out = (sel == 2'b00) ? in[0] :
                 (sel == 2'b01) ? in[1] :
                 (sel == 2'b10) ? in[2] :
                 in[3]; // default case selects the last input
endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module implements a 4-to-1 multiplexer with a 2-bit select signal, but it actually selects the input based on the least significant bit of the select signal.
